pitch_desc: Architectural view of the biosensor. Separated layers for material integration analysis.
report_empty: Configure the material architecture and run the simulation to generate the thermodynamic and structural diagnostic.
err_fill_layers: Fill all architecture layers to simulate.
err_mechanics: Environment requires flexible conformation, but base material ({{material}}) exhibits rigid/brittle behavior.
ok_mechanics: Structural integrity and flexibility guaranteed by {{material}}.
err_electrical: Circuit failure. {{material}} is an insulator lacking adequate electron mobility.
err_thermal: {{material}} in encapsulation causes excessive thermal dissipation to the epidermis.
ok_thermal: Thermal stability and insulation guaranteed by {{material}}.
